overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character in a red and blue suit walking through a nighttime New York City environment. The clip transitions from a covered market plaza through city streets and intersections, with the Empire State Building visible in the distance, autumn foliage on trees, and warm street lighting illuminating the wet pavement.

character runs past the man and exits the market area into open street

blue canopy covering vendor stall with cardboard boxes and tables

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks through a covered market plaza with hexagonal tile pavement, passing vendor stalls with blue canopies on both sides. A woman walks alongside him before turning left, and he approaches a man in a trench coat who gestures with open arms. The character then runs past the man to exit the market area.

traffic light changes from red to green while crossing the street between vehicles

yellow taxi cab waiting at the traffic light

traffic signal suspended over intersection showing red then green

trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered market to an open city intersection at night. Spider-Man crosses the asphalt street between a waiting silver sedan and yellow taxi while the traffic light changes from red to green. Stone buildings and autumn trees line the street.

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with autumn trees, passing a red Daily Bugle news van parked at the curb. The street is lined with modern buildings featuring illuminated entrances, and scattered pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with bus stop markings and distant landmark view

events.description: Empire State Building becomes visible in the distance between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the street toward the illuminated Empire State Building

segments.scene_description: Walking down the center of an asphalt street marked with yellow BUS STOP lettering, Spider-Man moves toward the Empire State Building which becomes visible in the distance. The street is lined with parked cars and green dumpsters, with autumn trees on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection with iconic skyscraper view and crosswalks

passes a pedestrian taking a photo of the Empire State Building

tall building with reflective glass curtain wall facade

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses a marked intersection with the Empire State Building now prominently visible in the center of the frame. He passes a man taking photos of the skyscraper and continues along the street lined with modern glass buildings and traffic lights. The wet pavement reflects the warm street lighting as he walks deeper into the downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered market plaza into the expansive, neon-lit streets of downtown New York City at night. It begins with Spider-Man navigating a covered market with hexagonal tiles and blue-canopied stalls, passing a gesturing man in a trench coat before running toward the exit. As he leaves the plaza, the scene opens into a city intersection where he crosses the asphalt between a silver sedan and a yellow taxi just as the traffic light turns green. The camera then follows him along a concrete sidewalk lined with autumn trees and a parked Daily Bugle news van, before shifting to the center of a street marked with yellow bus stop lettering. Finally, the view expands to reveal the Empire State Building prominently in the distance as he crosses a final intersection, moving past a photographer toward modern glass buildings and wet pavement reflecting the warm glow of the city lights.
